doc_name: Medical Device Deal Activity Shows Signs of Life for Q3 2024 | Knobbe Martens

chunks.doc_name: Medical Device Deal Activity Shows Signs of Life for Q3 2024 | Knobbe Martens
chunks.text: [Skip to content](#main) [Subscribe](javascript:void(0);) [![Knobbe Martens Logo](https://www.knobbe.com/wp-content/themes/knobbe/img/knobbe-logo-white.svg) IP + Technology Law](https://www.knobbe.com/) [Home](/) » [News & Insights](/news-insights/) » [Blogs](/blogs) » [Medical Devices & Procedures](/blogs/?_blog_categories=medical-devices-procedures) # Medical Device Deal Activity Shows Signs of Life for Q3 2024 November 22, 2024 | [Tom Cowan](https://www.knobbe.com/professionals/tom-cowan/) [Market reports](https://www.medicaldevice-network.com/dashboards/deals-dashboards/global-ma-activity-medical-devices-industry/) indicate the global medical device industry for Q3 2024 saw an increase in merger and acquisition (M&A) activity in terms of value year-over-year. Although deal value decreased compared to Q2 2024, deal volume increased compared to Q2 2024 and year-over-year. One [report](https://www.medicaldevice-network.com/dashboards/deals-dashboards/global-ma-activity-medical-devices-industry/?cf-view) states there were 168 medical device M&A deals announced in Q3 2024, worth a total value of $14.4B. For the global medical devices market, [GlobalData](https://www.globaldata.com/store/report/medical-devices-industry-m-and-a-deals-by-theme-quarterly-analysis/?utm_source=lgp4&utm_medium=23-105925&utm_campaign=thematic-report-hyperlink&_gl=1*d8185e*_ga*MTcyNjk3Mjk3My4xNzIyMjkwNjAx*_ga_8SZ1HHP33J*MTczMjIwNDYyMC4yLjAuMTczMjIwNDYyMC42MC4wLjA.) reports the following for Q3 2024: * global medical devices deals worth $34B – an increase of 25% compared to Q3 2023 * 275 M&A deals – an increase of 35% compared to Q3 2023 * 8 mega-deals (valued at more than $1B) – an increase of 14% compared to Q3 2023 The [Medical Device Network](https://www.medicaldevice-network.com/dashboards/deals-dashboards/global-ma-activity-medical-devices-industry/?cf-view) shows the following qualitative charts from GlobalData for global medical device deal volume and deal value from Q2 2022 to Q3 2024: ![](https://www.knobbe.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/KMED-blog-pic1.png) ![](https://www.knobbe.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/KMED-blog-pic2.png) According to GlobalData, the largest medical device M&A deal by value since Q1 2023 is the [Carlyle Group](https://www.carlyle.com/) [asset transaction](https://www.forbes.com/sites/joecornell/2024/08/19/baxter-to-sell-its-kidney-care-unit-to-carlyle-for-38-billion/) with target [Baxter International – Vantive Kidney Care](https://www.baxter.com/establishing-vantive) for $3.8B (Q3, 2024). The remaining top four medical device deals by value since Q1 2023 are the following: * [Becton Dickinson and Co.](https://www.bd.com/en-us) in an [asset transaction](https://news.bd.com/2024-09-03-BD-Completes-Acquisition-of-Critical-Care-from-Edwards-Lifesciences) with target [Critical Care](https://www.edwards.com/newsroom/news/2024-06-03-edwards-lifesciences-to-sell-critical-care-to-bd) for $4.2B (Q2, 2024) * [Merger](https://www.globenewswire.com/news-release/2023/09/01/2736012/0/en/Globus-Medical-Completes-Merger-with-NuVasive.html) of [Globus Medical](https://www.globusmedical.com/) and [NuVasive](https://www.nuvasive.com/) valued at $3.752B (Q1, 2023) * [Thermo Fisher Scientific](https://www.thermofisher.com/us/en/home.html) [acquires](https://www.reuters.com/markets/deals/thermo-fisher-scientific-buy-olink-31-billion-deal-2023-10-17/#:~:text=Thermo%20Fisher%20Scientific%20would%20acquire%20Olink%20Holding%20AB,its%20life%20sciences%20portfolio%20that%20helps%20drug%20discovery.) [Olink Holding](https://olink.com/) for $3.1B (Q4, 2023) * [J&J](https://www.jnj.com/) [acquires](https://www.cnbc.com/2024/04/05/johnson-johnson-to-buy-shockwave-medical-for-12point5-billion.html#:~:text=Johnson%20%26%20Johnson%20on%20Friday%20agreed%20to%20buy,vessels%2C%20similar%20to%20how%20kidney%20stones%20are%20treated.?msockid=1a2154dfdd1062923ab64070dceb6354) [Shockwave Medical](https://shockwavemedical.com/) for $1.31B (Q3, 2024) In the related “medtech” sector, [Goodwin](https://www.goodwinlaw.com/en/insights/publications/2024/11/insights-practices-mdt-medtech-ma-and-venture-investments) reports the sector “is heading toward 2025 with solid momentum.” [J.P Morgan](https://www.jpmorgan.com/global) [reports](https://www.jpmorgan.com/content/dam/jpmorgan/documents/cb/insights/outlook/jpm-medtech-deck-q3-2024-final-ada.pdf) that in medtech, as of Q3 2024, “M&A activity has already passed prior years in the number of deals with the dollar totals ready to pass as well.” In particular, “2024 YTD has seen 195 medtech acquisitions totaling $47.0 billion. In FY 2023, 128 medtech M&A deals were announced, totaling over $50.1 billion.” J.P. Morgan further [reports](https://www.jpmorgan.com/content/dam/jpmorgan/documents/cb/insights/outlook/jpm-medtech-deck-q3-2024-final-ada.pdf) that venture investment activity in medtech in 2024 “through the third quarter is set to beat full-year 2023 activity.” For example, “medtech venture activity through Q3 2024 has seen $16.1 billion from 554 funding rounds. Venture investments during the third quarter of 2024 totaled $5.1 billion across 154 rounds, up approximately $1 billion compared to Q3 2023.” In the “healthcare” sector, [Leerlink Partners](https://www.leerink.com/) reports that M&A activity “increased in the third quarter of 2024, with 33 transactions vs. 21 in 2023.” Within the healthcare sector generally, “healthcare services was the most active healthcare subsector, representing 42% of deal volume, with the most notable transaction being [TowerBrook’s](https://www.towerbrook.com/) and [CD&R’s](https://www.cdr.com/) $8.3B [acquisition](https://www.nasdaq.com/articles/towerbrook-cdr-compete-acquisition-r1-rcm) of [R1 RCM](https://www.r1rcm.com/).” Share ![Linkedin share link](https://www.knobbe.com/wp-content/themes/knobbe/img/icons/in-icon-share.svg) ![Bluesky share link](https://www.knobbe.com/wp-content/themes/knobbe/img/icons/bluesky-icon-share.svg) ![Threads share link](https://www.knobbe.com/wp-content/themes/knobbe/img/icons/threads-icon-share.svg) ![Facebook share link](https://www.knobbe.com/wp-content/themes/knobbe/img/icons/fb-icon-share.svg) ![Email share link](https://www.knobbe.com/wp-content/themes/knobbe/img/icons/mail-icon-share.svg) [![Subscribe](https://www.knobbe.com/wp-content/themes/knobbe/img/icons/mail-icon-share-white.svg) Subscribe for News and Updates](javascript:void(0);) ![Medical Device Deal Activity Shows Signs of Life for Q3 2024 Headshot](https://www.knobbe.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/Cowan-Tom-HI-2015-08-01-300x198.jpg) [#### Tom Cowan](https://www.knobbe.com/professionals/tom-cowan/)
